title: Pained by narrative that judiciary was shielding accused: Supreme Court on Twisha Sharma death
description: The Supreme Court on Monday expressed anguish over allegations that judiciary was shielding the accused in the Twisha Sharma death case because it involved allegations against a former district judge and a lawyer.A bench of Chief Justice of India Surya Kant, Justices Joymalya Bagchi, and Vipul M Pancholi was hearing a suo motu case initiated in the matter."We are slightly pained. We request media not take statements of friends or relatives etc. the mother in law is a former district judge and it
